issues: Inconsistent bolding of links throughout the page: links in the 'Recommended rules' list and some in-text links (e.g., 'define new rules', 'requirements for recommended rules') are bolded, while others (e.g., links in the 'Native rules' section, 'Skylib', 'awesomebazel.com', 'GitHub') are not.
